basic_details.job_title: IIM Kashipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Academic Assistant / Academic Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Management Kashipur Academic Assistant / Academic Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website IIM Kashipur. A total of various vacancies have been announced through the IIM Kashipur Academic Assistant / Academic Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in the relevant area (Finance/Accounting/Finance and Accounting), Postgraduate with first class or M.Phil or higher; ACA, AICWA, B.Tech/B.E., MCA also eligible
qualification.details: Academic Associate: Ph.D. in the relevant area (Finance/Accounting/Finance and Accounting) Academic Assistant: A Postgraduate with first class. Relevant experience either in academics or industry or an M. Phil [or higher qualification] will be preferred. Candidates with qualifications like ACA, AICWA, B. Tech. / B.E., MCA will also be eligible.

salary_details.details: Academic Associate: ₹ 33,000/- to ₹ 39,000/- per month Academic Assistant: ₹ 27,500/- to ₹ 32,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kashipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kashipur to complete the application.
